channel.title: IN on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in IN on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Hamilton County Sheriff’s Office (IN)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Hamilton County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: JEM Signed: March 3, 2025 County: Hamilton County State: IN FIPS: 18057

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: Miami Correctional Center — Miami, IN
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Miami Correctional Center in Miami County, IN.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)
